profile.occupation: Senior software engineer at a fintech startup
profile.personality: pragmatic, terse, slightly impatient. tracks money carefully. trusts a tool for ~3 messages then loses patience if it's slow or wrong. likes one-line answers.

voice.style: lowercase, abbrevs (k=thousand, w=with, prob=probably). occasional emoji. multi-fact in one msg sometimes. uses '$' explicitly.

agenda: Set up account, log a few real spends and one paycheck, ask 'can i afford X?' once or twice, set up a savings goal, undo a mistake. Eventually voice-note brain-dump 3 things at once.
confirmBehavior: Taps Yes confidently if the card matches what they meant. Cancels if amount or note is clearly wrong. Slightly impatient with multi-step confirms.
